description: Emit ValueFrom.SecretKeyRef instead of plain-text env values for ((vars)) resolved from the K8s Secrets credential manager, so secret values never appear in pod specs. Added SecretRefProvider interface + K8sSecretRef type (atc/creds), extended CredVarsTracker to record secret refs alongside interpolated creds, added ContainerSpec.SecretEnv, wired task_step containerSpec() population, and branched the jetbridge pod builder (atc/worker/jetbridge/container.go) to emit SecretKeyRef. Non-K8s cred managers (Vault/SSM/Conjur/CredHub) unaffected; log redaction preserved. All 5 phases complete (25/25 tasks).
